docs: Initialize the contract
constructors.label: new

docs: Event emitted when accumulated fees are recycled (transferred to recycle address)
events.label: FeesRecycled

docs: Event emitted when a user claims their pending slash payout
events.label: SlashClaimed

docs: Event emitted when a slash transfer fails and is stored for later claim
events.label: SlashPending

docs: Event emitted when validators confirm swap timeout
events.label: SwapTimedOut

docs: Event emitted when contract configuration changes
events.label: ConfigUpdated

docs: Event emitted when a miner is reserved for a swap
events.label: MinerReserved

docs: Event emitted when validators confirm swap completion
events.label: SwapCompleted

docs: Event emitted when a miner marks a swap as fulfilled
events.label: SwapFulfilled

docs: Event emitted when a validator initiates a swap (source tx pre-verified)
events.label: SwapInitiated

docs: Event emitted when a miner is activated or deactivated
events.label: MinerActivated

docs: Event emitted when a miner posts collateral
events.label: CollateralPosted

docs: Event emitted when a validator is added or removed
events.label: ValidatorUpdated

docs: Event emitted when collateral is slashed
events.label: CollateralSlashed

docs: Event emitted when a miner withdraws collateral
events.label: CollateralWithdrawn

docs: Event emitted when ownership is transferred
events.label: OwnershipTransferred

docs: Event emitted when a miner reservation is cancelled
events.label: ReservationCancelled

docs: Fulfillment-timeout extension proposed by a validator.
events.label: TimeoutExtensionProposed

docs: Fulfillment-timeout extension finalized — `timeout_block` is now
`applied_target`.
events.label: TimeoutExtensionFinalized

docs: Fulfillment-timeout extension challenged within the challenge window.
events.label: TimeoutExtensionChallenged

docs: Source-tx hash this proposal correlates to. Lets indexers tie the
extension activity back to the swap attempt without a join.
args.label: from_tx_hash

docs: Reservation extension proposed by a validator (single-validator, optimistic).
events.label: ReservationExtensionProposed

docs: Reservation extension finalized — `reserved_until` is now `applied_target`.
events.label: ReservationExtensionFinalized

docs: What target was being claimed; useful for "how off?" analytics.
args.label: voided_target

docs: Reservation extension challenged within the challenge window. The pending
entry is deleted; any validator may re-propose immediately.
events.label: ReservationExtensionChallenged

docs: Event emitted when a validator casts a vote
events.label: VoteCast

docs: Number of finalized extensions on the miner's current reservation.
Used by validators to know which tier of evidence the next propose
requires (redesign §13). Returns 0 for miners with no reservation
or no extensions yet.
messages.label: get_reservation_extension_count

docs: Mark a swap as fulfilled — miner direct (caller == swap.miner)
messages.label: mark_fulfilled

docs: Confirm a swap — validator-only, quorum mechanism
messages.label: confirm_swap

docs: Timeout a swap — validator-only, quorum mechanism
messages.label: timeout_swap

docs: Number of finalized extensions on this swap's fulfillment timeout.
Used by validators to tier the next propose (redesign §13).
messages.label: get_swap_extension_count

docs: Claim a pending slash payout (user calls after failed transfer)
messages.label: claim_slash

docs: Deactivate a miner — only the miner themselves can deactivate, and only
when idle. Blocks mid-swap or while reserved so miners cannot dodge
in-flight obligations via self-deactivation.
messages.label: deactivate

docs: Vote to activate a miner — validator-only, quorum required.
messages.label: vote_activate

docs: Vote to deactivate a miner — validator-only, quorum required.
Trust-based: on quorum the miner's active flag is cleared, full stop.
No collateral, status, or balance gates beyond "currently active".
Deliberately unconstrained so the validator consensus can cover any
remediation case (min_collateral raise, protocol abuse, operational
emergencies). Abuse protection comes from the quorum itself — the
same trust envelope as `vote_activate` / `vote_reserve`.
Not blocked mid-swap: the existing swap lifecycle proceeds via its
persisted assignment. Miner cannot re-activate while below the
collateral floor because `vote_activate` still checks it.
messages.label: vote_deactivate

docs: Returns the full whitelisted validator set. O(N) storage read with N
bounded by the (small) validator count. Callers wanting just the
count should prefer `get_validator_count` which skips the clone.
messages.label: get_validators

docs: Composite miner read: (collateral, active, has_active_swap,
reserved_until, deactivation_block). One RPC for the CLI views
that otherwise make four to six separate contract reads per
render.
messages.label: get_miner_snapshot

docs: Returns the reservation amounts (tao, from, to) if one exists.
Callers that also need `reserved_until` can query
`get_miner_reserved_until` separately — it's a cheap single-field
read on the same struct.
messages.label: get_reservation_data
